name: install-gate
description: Supply-chain gate for package install commands, typosquats, slopsquats, and install-time code execution.

interface.shortDescription: Review install commands before dependencies land.
interface.longDescription: Supply-chain gate for package installs. It parses npm, pnpm, yarn, bun, pip, and cargo commands, then flags typosquats, slopsquat-shaped names, and install-time code execution.
defaultPrompt: Check this install command for risk.
